name: Mushroom Pepper Saute
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
2. Lightly grease a 4 x 8 baking dish with sesame oil.
3. Mix triticale flour with basil, thyme, salt, soy sauce, and water in a bowl until well combined.
4. In a separate pan, saute the vegetables (mushrooms, green pepper, and scallions) for about 4 minutes.
5. Add the triticale sauce to the sauted vegetables and stir to combine.
6. Transfer all ingredients to the prepared baking dish.
7. Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
